Technovations 2026

TECHNOVATIONS 2026

AI Sports Rehabilitation
& Biomechanics Challenge

Project Expo & SportAlthon

FOR COLLEGE STUDENTS

Calling all engineering, technology, and medical college students. Build and present machine learning models, wearable device prototypes, and movement analysis dashboards to revolutionize athletic recovery.

Register For EventView Challenge Tracks

The Innovation Project Expo

Present your working models, hardware prototypes, software solutions, or research findings in a booth exhibition format. Teams will demonstrate their systems to a panel of orthopedic surgeons, sports biomechanists, and industry experts.

  • Working software/hardware demo is required
  • Poster board display detailing model telemetry
AI Sports Analytics
CHALLENGE FIELDS

CHALLENGE TOPIC TRACKS

Develop and submit your software, models, or device concepts inside one of our four key tracks.

AI Injury Analysis

Computer vision & deep learning models for posture and musculoskeletal gait tracking.

Return To Play

Quantitative tools to evaluate joint range of motion symmetry and load capacity.

Wearable Tech

IMU, muscle EMG mapping, and smartwatch integrations tracking motion telemetry.

Sports Performance

Joint angle mapping and force analysis platforms for running optimization.

SECURE YOUR SPOT

Registration includes full access to the Project Expo space, entry into the hackathon segment, lunch coupons for the team, and certificates endorsed by Valli Orthopedic & Sports Hospital.

Entry Fee₹3,000 / Team
